shippingMethod.flat_rate15: Shipping by post to cities and Tehran
shippingMethod.flat_rate22: Snapbox shipping (cost is cash on delivery). For delivery time after placing the order, please send a message via direct or WhatsApp.
shippingMethod.flat_rate23: Tipax shipping cash on delivery (packaging cost is 10,000 Toman). Delivery cost depends on the weight of the package and the distance from Tehran and usually starts from 70,000 Toman.

description1: We create unique handmade products with love and care. From the very beginning, our goal has been to bring a sense of peace and beauty to your homes. Every product we make is crafted with attention to detail and the best materials.
description2: Our team is made up of motivated and creative individuals, each contributing with passion and energy to create products that not only bring you beauty but also enrich your daily life with good feelings and tranquility.
goalDescription: We believe in quality, innovation, and respect for the environment, and we strive to provide you with not just excellent products, but a unique experience using natural materials and sustainable processes.

qualityGuarantee.title: Quality Guarantee:
qualityGuarantee.description: We carefully select and review each product to ensure it meets our high-quality standards.

convenience.title: Convenience:
convenience.description: With a simple user interface and a hassle-free ordering process, shopping has never been this easy.

excellentCustomerService.title: Excellent Customer Service:
excellentCustomerService.description: Our dedicated and professional team is always ready to assist you to ensure your satisfaction is our top priority.

shippingMethod.title: Shipping Method
shippingMethod.description: Your products will be shipped via expedited mail or regular mail. Depending on the type of product and your choice, we will offer the best shipping method.

deliveryTime.title: Delivery Time
deliveryTime.details:
- Expedited Mail: 1 to 3 business days
- Regular Mail: 6 to 8 business days
The above times depend on your conditions and address. In case of any delays, we will inform you.
